summary: Refactoring Session 141 - All 25 backend tests passed + frontend UI verified. Tested: (1) email_polling_service.py module extraction with all functions loading correctly, (2) classification_helpers.py module extraction with classify_document_type, get_category_for_doc_type, derive_workflow_status, (3) salesperson/rep assignment wiring in SO creation flow - _lookup_bc_customer returns (customer_number, salesperson_code) tuple, (4) routers import from extracted services correctly, (5) all API endpoints return valid responses.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring session verified. Key changes: (1) services/email_polling_service.py - extracted ~500 lines from server.py including get_email_watcher_config, poll_mailbox_for_attachments, poll_mailbox_for_documents, email_polling_worker, dynamic_mailbox_polling_worker, run_sales_email_poll, (2) services/classification_helpers.py - extracted classify_document_type, get_category_for_doc_type, derive_workflow_status, (3) services/auto_post_service.py - _lookup_bc_customer now returns (customer_number, salesperson_code) tuple, attempt_auto_create_sales_order passes salesperson to order_data, (4) services/business_central_service.py - create_sales_order accepts and includes salesperson field in BC API payload. All routers updated to import from extracted services instead of server.py.
